description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal dumpster with a weathered red exterior and a black, ribbed metal lid. The lid is divided into four hinged sections, each showing signs of wear, rust, and handprints, suggesting frequent use. Graffiti and markings are visible on the sides, adding to its urban, well-used appearance. A yellow warning label is present on one side, and the base shows scuff marks and scratches. The dumpster lacks visible wheels or handles, indicating it is likely designed to remain stationary. Its robust construction and size suggest it is intended for heavy-duty waste collection in public or commercial outdoor environments.
description: A large, red metal dumpster with a black, ribbed lid, graffiti, and warning labels, showing signs of heavy urban use.
description_view_0: The left side of the dumpster is visible, featuring yellow graffiti and the sloped, ribbed black lid.
description_view_1: The back view shows the full ribbed lid with handprints and a yellow warning label on the red body.
description_view_2: The right side displays more graffiti, a clean view of the ribbed lid, and no visible handles or wheels.
description_view_3: The front view reveals a plain red surface with weathering and no visible openings, handles, or labels.
attribute_lid_type: hinged, flat, ribbed metal lid with four sections; no visible locking or opening mechanisms
